references.title: Investigating Trust in Context-Aware Recommender System in Education

annotations.text: Embedding context awareness in recommender systems has been shown to increase the accuracy of the recommender. In education, these CARS often are less trusted because the information provided needs to be trustworthy.
Author investigates how to build trust in these recommenders: i) user perception, ii) designing interventions to build trust, iii) multidimension approach to building trust.
